diagoram: 1 packages, 2 structs, 1 interfaces, 8 named types

.
  Code      (type)      constants=4  methods=0
  Index     (map)       methods=0  → Item
  Item      (struct)    fields=1 methods=0
  ItemAlias (alias)     methods=0  → Item
  Items     (slice)     methods=1  → Item
  Mode      (type)      constants=2  methods=0
  Sizer     (interface) methods=1  ← implements: Items
  Transform (func)      methods=0  → Index, Items
  Vector    (array)     methods=0  → Item
  hidden    (slice)     methods=0  → Item
  secret    (struct)    fields=1 methods=0  → Item
